name: SeaWorld San Diego
formerNames: SeaWorld of California and SeaWorld Adventure Park
city: 500 Sea World Drive, San Diego, California, United States
description: SeaWorld San Diego is a theme park in Mission Bay Park in San Diego, California.  It is a marine mammal park, oceanarium, public aquarium, and marine animal rehabilitation center.  It opened in 1964 as the first theme park in the SeaWorld chain.
